rationale.System: The source document explicitly defers describing 'which system of record drives the GL close' -- KAI has nothing to extract, so this required type is genuinely Missing, not merely unextracted.
rationale.Business Rule: The GL Balance Rule is named but its owner sign-off / balancing checklist is explicitly deferred in the source text, producing an object with an empty description (Partial).
rationale.Risk: The Late Close risk is named but its mitigation/owner is explicitly deferred in the source text, producing an object with an empty description (Partial).

note: Target is the Phase 13 spec's illustrative ~63%; the real engine's discrete Complete/Partial/Missing x weight arithmetic against the real Dashboard profile (4 required @ Critical=3 + 1 optional @ Supporting=1, total=13 points) cannot land on every percentage exactly. DatasetValidator measures the real value; see ground_truth/coverage_curve.json for the actual measured numbers this dataset converged on.
